name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
CourseConnect connects teachers and students for paid online courses.

Teachers: create a course, set a price and session times, then manage capacity and waiting lists.
Students: browse courses, pay once to enroll, get your join link, and receive reminders before class.

Tap /start to open the menu. Everything is reachable from the buttons — no extra commands to remember.

name: the Help menu button shows the same help text
